channel.title: FAU Cyber Security Club
channel.description: 👋 Welcome to the FAU Cyber Security Club Wiki! This wiki is currently underconstruction. If you would like to help me with it, contact me @solitude_freak or @shaamad on the Discord. Resources im using: hugo docs hugo relearn theme docs md cheetsheet

item.title: Introduction
item.description: This Wiki is where you can find quick information about the club and current events, as well as helpful resources and guides to help you get initalized. We strongly encourage an open environment of learning, so NEVER be afraid to ask questions. It is ok if you don’t know something, remember that we are all learning. And the best way to learn is to fail!

item.title: Links
item.description: USEFUL LINKS Guide on all things Cyber https://github.com/Berkanktk/CyberSecurity?tab=readme-ov-file#links ACTIVE CLUB REPOS Repo for this wiki https://github.com/dxcently/fau-cyber-security-club-wiki ARCHIVED CLUB REPOS 2026 eMERGE Project Scalpel Hackathon - Cowrie Honeypot with Hybrid Edge AI

item.title: TODO
item.description: TODO Setting up VM guide Club env (have a standard “club environment” for hacking) Glossary page Have an permanent CTF environment running (that can regenerate itself) for newcomers (nix) Contacts page career path map Have this wiki/one page be hackable Wiki layout Home Introduction Getting Started Roadmap Setting up a VM Hacking the club server Club Tools CTF blue teaming red teaming Connections Links
